head.title: Sitemap — Mason's Weather Network

body.class: bg-gradient-to-tr from-[#0f172a] via-[#111827] to-[#1e1b4b] min-h-screen text-slate-100 flex flex-col justify-between antialiased relative

div.class: absolute top-0 right-1/4 w-96 h-96 bg-indigo-500/5 rounded-full blur-3xl pointer-events-none

main.class: max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 py-16 z-10 w-full

header.p: Structured directory of active microclimate arrays maintained by Broadcast Director Mason Ramirez in coordination with NOAA & NWS.

section.class: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6 hover:border-indigo-500/30 transition-all duration-300

div.p: The central navigation hub serving as the entry point to both coastal and high-desert real-time weather stations.

section.class: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6 hover:border-sky-500/30 transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col justify-between

div.p: Coastal telemetry networks monitoring tide phases, ocean temps, and marine layers.

span.class: text-[11px] bg-sky-500/10 text-sky-300 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold
text-[11px] bg-sky-500/10 text-sky-300 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold
text-[11px] bg-sky-500/10 text-sky-300 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold
text-[11px] bg-sky-500/10 text-sky-300 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold

section.class: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6 hover:border-amber-500/30 transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col justify-between

div.p: High-altitude and desert microclimate diagnostics tracking harsh thermal dynamics.

span.class: text-[11px] bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-300 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold
text-[11px] bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-300 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold
text-[11px] bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-300 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold
text-[11px] bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-300 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold
text-[11px] bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-300 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold

footer.class: w-full text-center py-8 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 border-t border-white/5 z-10

body.footer: © 2026 Mason's Weather Network • Telemetry Registered • Powered by Mason Ramirez, NWS, & NOAA Protocols.
